rulings.Case Title: ANNE W. THAYER VS. TRINITY PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Class Certification
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 1 - PLAINTIFF ANNE THAYER and ERNEST THAYER's Motion For Class Certification. Plaintiff's Motion for Class Certification is DENIED. By proceeding to the trial on the merits, Plaintiff waived class allegations/certification. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: QUINTEN JOSEPH FRY, BY THEO HONNIBALL, POWER OF VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Renotice) Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 2 - PLAINTIFF QUINTEN JOSEPH FRY, BY THEO HONNIBALL's (Renotice) Of Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Third Amended Complaint. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File Third Amended Complaint is continued to April 26, 2013 to be heard with other pending motions. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MERINDA KEPHART et al VS. ESTATE OF IMELDA DOLLARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Isac Marchasin'S Answers To Pltf'S Deposition Questions Regarding Ownership Of His Real Estate Interest And Follow-Up Questions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 3 - PLAINTIFF MERINDA KEPHART and CORNELIUS GRAHAM's Motion For Order Compelling Isac Marchasin'S Answers To Plaintiff'S Deposition Questions Regarding Ownership Of His Real Estate Interest And Follow-Up Questions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Answers to Deposition Questions is GRANTED. Defendant shall confirm that he owns or does not own residential buildings in San Francisco. No sanctions. =(AJR)

rulings.Case Title: AMERICA PRADO GUERRERO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff shall have final opportunity to amend second cause of action to allege actionable conduct by moving defendant. No opposition filed. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MESHA MONGE-IRIZARRY VS. THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12,2013, line 5 - Defendants' Bank of America, Recontrust Company N.A. and The Bank of New York Mellon's Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint sustained with leave to amend to allege tender; duty under CCC 2924b(c)(2), breach of duty under CCC 2924g; fraud with particularity; all elements of breach of warranty of habitability. Plaintiff shall also allege actionable conduct in view of Ross v. Title Guar. & Trust Co. (1934) 136 Cal. App. 393, 399. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MAKI KAYANO VS. DAVID WALZER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT DAVID WALZER's MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Motion to Strike Second Amended Complaint is continued April 19, 2013 on Court's motion. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MAKI KAYANO VS. DAVID WALZER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT DAVID WALZER's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is continued April 19, 2013 on Court's motion. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SHING KIT LEE et al VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Req For Admissions; Ntc Of Intent To Appear By Telephone
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF SHING LEE and JULIE LEE's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Req For Admissions. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Request for Admissions is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Grant sanctions in the amount of $368.75 and costs in the amount of $60. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SHING KIT LEE et al VS. CHARLEMAGNE EVANGELISTA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft To Further Respond To Interrogatories Nos 1 Through 20, 22, 24, 25 And 27 Through 32 Of Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And To Pay The Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF SHING LEE and JULIE LEE's Motion To Compel Deft To Further Respond To Interrogatories Nos 1 Through 20, 22, 24, 25 And 27 Through 32 Of Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories, And To Pay The Reasonable Attorney'S Fees And Costs Of The Motion. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further responses to Special Interrogatories is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Grant sanctions in the amount of $543.75 and costs in the amount of $60. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SANDRA ABRAHAM et al VS. JOHN HENNING et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT JOHN F. HENNING III's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default/Default judgment based on CCP 473(b) is GRANTED. Defendant shall file his answer; post $9,080.75 with the Court; and remit $150 to Plaintiff no later than April 16, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LEONA T. FONG VS. SERGIO SILVA LAINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 13 - DEFENDANT SERGIO LAINEZ, MAGALY SILVA, SERGIO SILVA, PRISCILLA SILVA and MAGALY SILVA's Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs. Defendants' Motion for Attorney's Fees is GRANTED: attorney's fees in the amount of $10,620 (23.6 hours at $450/hour) and costs $1,096.75. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA VILLANUEVA VS. ALICIA SALVADOR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT ALICIA SALVADOR's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Notice fails to comply with CCP 1161(2) and is fatally defective. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MARITSA DI MEGLIO VS. JUSTINN ROGERS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 12 - DEFENDANT JUSTINN ROGERS and DANIEL HENRY's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendants' Motion to Set Aside Judgment. Hearing Required: (1) D Henry to provide declaration from emergency doctor identifying time of intake; (2) D Rogers to provide doctor's declaration regarding her condition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LORENZO GASTINELL et al VS. LETICA FREEMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 10 - DEFENDANT LETICIA FREEMAN and FRANKS, JEANAE's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege in good faith service of Notice, expiration of notice, and attach lease if complaint is not based solely on nonpayment of rent. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ADRIANA LEON et al VS. GISELE LOYOLA PINHEIRO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 12, 2013, line 11 - DEFENDANT ALEXANDRE PINHEIRO and GISELE LOYOLA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurrer to Complaint is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiffs fail to cite any authority for the proposition that "typographical" error does not render the notice fatally defective; or that the notice, non-compliant with SFRO 37.9B(c), can support a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Plaintiffs also do not argue that this error can be cured by amendment. =(501/AJR)
